Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
REST Client API
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
    Class
    Description
    UrlEncodingParser
    Parses URL-encoded text into POJO models.
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding used by org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
    Class
    Description
    UrlEncoding
    Annotation that can be applied to classes, fields, and methods to tweak how they are handled by UrlEncodingSerializer and UrlEncodingParser.
    UrlEncodingAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    UrlEncodingApply
    Dynamically applies a @UrlEncoding annotation to specified classes, methods, or fields.
    UrlEncodingApplyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    UrlEncodingBeanPropertyMeta
    Metadata on bean properties specific to the URL-Encoding serializers and parsers pulled from the @UrlEncoding annotation on the bean property.
    UrlEncodingClassMeta
    Metadata on classes specific to the URL-Encoding serializers and parsers pulled from the @UrlEncoding annotation on the class.
    UrlEncodingConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in UrlEncodingSerializer and UrlEncodingParser.
    UrlEncodingMetaProvider
    Interface for providing access to UrlEncodingClassMeta and UrlEncodingBeanPropertyMeta objects.
    UrlEncodingParser
    Parses URL-encoded text into POJO models.
    UrlEncodingParser.Builder
    Builder class.
    UrlEncodingParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UrlEncodingParser.
    UrlEncodingParserSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
    UrlEncodingSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UrlEncodingSerializer.
    UrlEncodingSerializerSession.Builder
    Builder class.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding used by org.apache.juneau.rest.client.classic
    Class
    Description
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Builder
    Builder class.
